description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a spacious, fenced yard featuring lush green lawns, palm trees, and a variety of outdoor amenities including a pergola, a covered patio, and a driveway leading to a two-car garage. The building itself is constructed with light-colored brick or stone walls and a flat roof, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light. The interior layout is open and modern, with distinct living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as multiple bedrooms and bathrooms. Outdoor living spaces are well-integrated, including a shaded seating area and a garden with flower beds along the perimeter. The property is enclosed by a solid fence with a main gate for vehicle and pedestrian access. The overall design emphasizes comfort, privacy, and seamless indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light brick exterior, large windows, and a spacious fenced yard featuring gardens, a pergola, and a two-car garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with palm trees and flower beds.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, pergola, covered patio, and extensive lawn area.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage, side entrance, and outdoor seating area under a canopy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the open lawn, rear facade, and additional garden space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
